indicators.name: dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and lacks a dedicated workspace for computer work.

indicators.name: ladder
indicators.rationale: The ladder is not suitable for computer work as it is not a stable surface and can be a safety hazard.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is insufficient for computer work, as it is not bright enough to reduce eye strain.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of a dining table and a ladder makes it difficult to set up a stable and safe workspace. Additionally, the lighting is not sufficient for extended computer work, which is crucial for maintaining focus and reducing eye strain.
